roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S (IN PRO PER) PC1203,4 PETITION FOR DISM FILED
ACCT SETUP IN CUBS,REFER ALL FINES AND FEES TO COLLECTIONS UNIT

/X PUBLIC DEFENDER ALEEM RAJA APPEARRED FOR THE DEFENDANT AS A FRIEND OFE COURT,/X:DEFENDANT IS SWORNED AND EXAMINED,/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4(A) MOTION/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4(A),/X:THE COURT MAKES A FINDING AND GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC  1203,4(A)  IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA ISSET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNEDAND FILED IN COURT,/

/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 15D/CTS:0/SWAPD:04-01-09/X:UPON 18 MONTHS SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF PROGRAM AND PROPER FILING OF MOTION, PROBATION MAY BE REDUCED TO COURT PROBATION,/PF460/VF1/DDP2/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE AN 18MONTH TREATMENT PROGRAM/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/
/CAL:FOR PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
